name: Missing Semicolon
description: Detects missing semicolons at the end of statements.
message: Possible missing semicolon at the end of the line.
suggestion: Add a semicolon ';' at the end of the statement.

name: Unclosed String Literal
description: Detects string literals that are not properly closed.
suggestion: Ensure all string literals are closed with the matching quote character.

name: Naming Convention Violation
message: Function name starts with an uppercase letter. JavaScript standard is camelCase.
suggestion: Rename the function to use camelCase (e.g., 'myFunction' instead of 'MyFunction').

name: Too Many Parameters
description: Detects functions with more than 5 parameters.
message: Function has too many parameters (more than 5).
suggestion: Consider grouping parameters into a single object to improve readability.

name: Console Log Check
description: Detects console.log statements in production code.
suggestion: Remove console.log statements before deploying to production.

name: Unused Variable
description: Detects variables that are declared but not used.
suggestion: Remove the unused variable to clean up the code.
